creator: frewq28@gmail.com
text:
Compilation fails on the following patch:
files/patch-gfx_src_ps_nsFontMetricsPS.cpp -- required to be removed (those changes already present in the target file)

Fix: 

rm /usr/ports/www/firefox/files/patch-gfx_src_ps_nsFontMetricsPS.cpp
How-To-Repeat: portupgrade firefox
OR
cd /usr/ports/www/firefox && make
